--- import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Accordion, AccordionContent, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/accordion" import { Section, SectionContainer } from "@/components/ui/section" type Props = { class?: string title: string faqs: { id: string question: string answer: string }[] } const { class: className, title, faqs } = Astro.props ---

{title}

{ faqs.map((item) => ( {item.question} {item.answer} )) }
